fast.identity: driven anime protagonist channeling intense lyric emotion into every frame
fast.silhouette: strong forward-leaning silhouette with kinetic readiness
fast.texture: kinetic {main_color} atmosphere, beat-driven motion, sharp rim contrasts

slow.identity: introspective anime protagonist quietly holding the weight of the lyric's emotion
slow.silhouette: still inward-facing silhouette with deep internal light
slow.texture: minimal motion, slow breathing {main_color} glow, intimate frame depth

medium.identity: anime protagonist shaped by the song's central emotional arc
medium.silhouette: balanced silhouette with expressive hand and gaze language
medium.texture: measured {main_color} rhythm, lyric-tied movement, mid-range cinematic depth

hair_rules.hair: flowing dark hair with gentle {main_color} bloom at the edges
sharp-textured dark hair with aggressive {main_color} color strikes
soft layered dark hair with translucent {main_color} edge light

hair_default: dark hair with restrained {main_color} rim glow shaped by the song's mood

outfit_rules.outfit: dark performance-ready outfit with reflective trim and clean stage lines
dark modern street coat with subtle reflective edge detail
simple layered dark casual wear with soft trim

outfit_default: dark contemporary outfit with subtle {main_color} accent detail
